The Agentic Customer Engagement Platform

Built for marketing & product teams that don't just want to run campaigns, but to win outcomes. Agents handle workflows for your team and decisioning for every customer, learning and improving with every interaction.

Let's Talk

An agent for every marketing job

An agent for each user

1:1 Decisioning for Every User

Move Beyond Segments & Campaigns,
Deliver True 1:1 Engagement at Scale

Marketers can now provision an agent for every user. One that learns, decides, and
composes autonomously, and improves with every interaction.

Limited Segments

You manually create a handful of static segments to tailor messages

Restricted Content

You must stay on top of your users' evolving language and preferences

Manual A/B tests

You run A/B tests one at a time on one or two specific variables

Individual Users

Agents identify and act on user patterns in real time, down to the individual level

Limitless Creativity

Access a rich library of content variants without compromising brand integrity

Ongoing Optimizations

Agents test thousands of variants in parallel constantly learning and optimizing for impact

Learn More
Merlin AI Agents for Marketers

Build Agents That Own The Entire
Workflow, Not Just The Next Step

Define the goal. Merlin AI Agents handle the rest. From audience selection to execution, and
everything in between. Your team focuses on outcomes, not steps.

Learn More

Cross-Channel Marketing

Where Real-Time Travel Meets Real-Time Engagement

"KAYAK needed a platform that could keep pace with real-time travel. VP of Technology, KAYAK

Campaign launch time (down from 1 month)

About MoEngage

MoEngage is the agentic customer engagement platform trusted by 1,350+ global brands like McAfee, Flipkart, Domino’s, Nestle, Deutsche Telekom, and more. MoEngage’s powerful analytics, personalization, and AI capabilities give a 360-degree view of your customers and help you create journeys across digital channels.
